meanings.usage: 形容词，由comfortable加否定前缀un-构成
描述当前流行的款式或风格
in fashion表示流行，out of fashion表示过时
用于询问衣物、鞋子的大小
指成双成对的东西，如鞋子、手套
用于询问或描述物品的颜色
表示穿衣服、鞋子、戴帽子等
过去式为bought，用于描述购买行为
用于请求他人帮忙购买或获取某物
last month表示上个月，last year表示去年
后面接形容词，表示外表看起来如何

phrases.usage: 表示某物正在流行或时髦

examples.en: These shoes are in fashion now.

phrases.usage: 表示某物已经过时，不再流行

examples.en: They were in fashion last year.

phrases.usage: 表示上个月，过去的时间

examples.en: My sister bought this pair last month.
examples.zh: 我姐姐上个月买了这双。

examples.en: They were in fashion the year before last too.
She bought them in the U.S.

phrases.usage: 请求他人帮忙购买某物

examples.en: Can you get a pair for me, please?

phrases.usage: 一双，一对，用于描述成双的物品

examples.en: Can you get a pair for me?

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Past Simple Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去发生的动作或存在的状态
grammar.structure: 主语 + 动词过去式 + 其他
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去发生的行为、事件或状态，注意不规则动词的变化

examples.en: My sister bought this pair last month.
examples.zh: 我姐姐上个月买了这双。

examples.en: We had some shoes like those a month ago.
examples.zh: 一个月前我们有那种鞋。

grammar.title: 一般过去时的否定句
grammar.definition: 在助动词did后面加not，动词恢复原形
grammar.structure: 主语 + did not (didn't) + 动词原形 + 其他
grammar.usage: 用于否定过去发生的动作

sentencePatterns.pattern: Do you have any + 名词 + like these?

original.en: Do you have any shoes like these?

imitations.en: Do you have any bags like these?
Do you have any dresses like these?

original.en: What size? Size five. What colour? Black.
original.zh: 什么尺码？五号。什么颜色？黑色。

imitations.en: What size? Size seven. What colour? Blue.
imitations.zh: 什么尺码？七号。什么颜色？蓝色。

imitations.en: What size do you wear? I wear size eight.
imitations.zh: 你穿多大尺码？我穿八号。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be (is/are) + in fashion / out of fashion

original.en: They were in fashion last year.

imitations.en: This style is in fashion this year.
That colour is out of fashion now.

sentencePatterns.pattern: Can you get + 名词 + for me?

original.en: Can you get a pair for me, please?

imitations.en: Can you get a ticket for me?
Can you get some coffee for me?
